superseded_note: PARP-axis numeric blocks in findings 1–3 were revised 2026-04 to match manuscript receipts (n=19/1498 expression; Spearman n=481). Exploratory JSONs with n=8/1665 and n=488 are deprecated—see deprecated_exploratory.

hypothesis_versions.v1_DEAD: MBD4 LOF → RNF144A downregulation → PARP1 not degraded → PARPi sensitivity
hypothesis_versions.v2_ALIVE: MBD4 LOF → BER stress → PARP1 transcriptional upregulation → more PARP trapping → PARPi sensitivity

1_rnf144a_hop_killed.test: Mann-Whitney (two-sided): RNF144A expression in MBD4 LikelyLoF vs non-LOF expression pool
1_rnf144a_hop_killed.verdict: DEAD — RNF144A is not downregulated in MBD4 LOF under manuscript-aligned cohort definition

2_parp1_expression_not_significant.test: Mann-Whitney (two-sided): PARP1 expression in MBD4 LikelyLoF vs non-LOF expression pool
2_parp1_expression_not_significant.direction: small LOF elevation, not statistically significant
2_parp1_expression_not_significant.verdict: NOT SIGNIFICANT — PARP1 is not convincingly upregulated in MBD4 LOF at expression level (manuscript p≈0.605)
2_parp1_expression_not_significant.note_comparator_vs_pharmacology_wt: Expression comparator ≠ pharmacology WT (no somatic MBD4); see receipt inputs.tests.note_vs_pharmacology

3_parp1_predicts_parpi_sensitivity_panca.test: Spearman (two-sided): PARP1 expression vs mean PARPi Z-score (GDSC2), inner join on ModelID
3_parp1_predicts_parpi_sensitivity_panca.verdict: STRONG PAN-CANCER ASSOCIATION — higher PARP1 expression associates with greater PARPi sensitivity (more negative Z) under manuscript-aligned join
3_parp1_predicts_parpi_sensitivity_panca.quartile_stratification: Fig. 4 panel B computes Q25/Q75 median Z from merged table at figure-build time (not frozen in this synthesis file)

4_ucec_clinical_os_signal.test: MBD4-mutant vs non-mutant overall survival in TCGA UCEC
4_ucec_clinical_os_signal.confound: 18/26 BRCA1 co-mutated, 22/26 BRCA2 co-mutated — hypermutated MSI-H tumors. Survival advantage NOT independently attributable to MBD4.
4_ucec_clinical_os_signal.verdict: SIGNAL but CONFOUNDED — MBD4 patients live 2× longer but are hypermutated with BRCA co-mutations. Cannot isolate MBD4 effect.

5_cbioportal_parpi_cohort_search.test: Search for PARPi-treated cohorts with MBD4 status
5_cbioportal_parpi_cohort_search.msk_impact: 0 MBD4 mutations — gene not on targeted panel
5_cbioportal_parpi_cohort_search.genie_bpc: Not on public cBioPortal — requires Synapse access
5_cbioportal_parpi_cohort_search.verdict: BLOCKED — no publicly available PARPi cohort with MBD4 status exists on cBioPortal

options: AACR GENIE BPC via Synapse (requires account + access request)
Author request from Clinical and Translational Oncology (2025) olaparib maintenance paper
MSK-IMPACT 50K download from AACR (may include MBD4 if on extended panel)

parp1_expression_as_biomarker.description: PARP1 expression vs PARPi sensitivity (ρ≈−0.416, n=481, two-sided p≈1.36×10⁻²¹) is receipt-backed in parp1_parpi_spearman_MANUSCRIPT_RECEIPT.json.
parp1_expression_as_biomarker.what_would_strengthen: Validate in independent drug screen (PRISM, CTD^2) or clinical PFS correlation

publishable_now: Axis A: MBD4 → cytidine analog SL (existing receipts)
PARP1 expression as pan-cancer PARPi sensitivity correlate (Spearman; manuscript receipt n=481)
Ceralasertib / ATR-axis pharmacology stress tests and LOO (canonical_atr_wee1_rerun receipts)
needs_more_data: MBD4 LOF → PARPi sensitivity at single-drug level (see pharmacology n_lof vs expression n_lof definitions)
Clinical validation of any MBD4 → PARPi claim
killed: RNF144A downregulation mechanism (two-sided MWU p≈0.48; wrong direction for v1)
cBioPortal public PARPi cohort with MBD4 (doesn't exist)
